'''zabawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kyathos|kyathos]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-b-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kyathos|kyathos]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zabawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zæbæwæth|zæbæwæth]] || [[word:zæbæwæj|zæbæwæj]] || [[word:zæbæwæsh|zæbæwæsh]] || [[word:zæbæwæ|zæbæwæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zababawath|zababawath]] || [[word:zababawaj|zababawaj]] || [[word:zababawash|zababawash]] || [[word:zababawa|zababawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zabawath|zabawath]] || [[word:zabawaj|zabawaj]] || [[word:zabawash|zabawash]] || [[word:zabawa|zabawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zabafwath|zabafwath]] || [[word:zabafwaj|zabafwaj]] || [[word:zabafwash|zabafwash]] || [[word:zabafwaf|zabafwaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zabawatha|zabawatha]] || [[word:zabawaja|zabawaja]] || [[word:zabawasha|zabawasha]] || [[word:zabawaka|zabawaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zabawath|zabawath]] || [[word:zabawaj|zabawaj]] || [[word:zabawash|zabawash]] || [[word:zabawa|zabawa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zabawathal|zabawathal]] || [[word:zabawajal|zabawajal]] || [[word:zabawashal|zabawashal]] || [[word:zabawakal|zabawakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zabawathatha|zabawathatha]] || [[word:zabawajaja|zabawajaja]] || [[word:zabawashasha|zabawashasha]] || [[word:zabawaka|zabawaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zabawathan|zabawathan]] || [[word:zabawajan|zabawajan]] || [[word:zabawashan|zabawashan]] || [[word:zabawakan|zabawakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zabawathaoro|zabawathaoro]] || [[word:zabawajaoro|zabawajaoro]] || [[word:zabawashaoro|zabawashaoro]] || [[word:zabawakaoro|zabawakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
